notes: Issue #3539 is a type/enhancement request to add scroll wheel and full touch/input event infrastructure to WPF and WinForms views. Code inspection confirms the current state: WPF (SKElement, SKGLElement) and WinForms (SKControl, SKGLControl) views have zero touch/wheel/input event handling — grep found no references to Touch, MouseWheel, EnableTouch, or SKTouchHandler in either view project. The MAUI Windows SKTouchHandler already implements wheel support via PointerWheelChanged with MouseWheelDelta passthrough, confirming the reference pattern exists. Console fallback is not applicable — this is purely about UI view event wiring in platform-specific WPF/WinForms classes, not core SkiaSharp logic. Requires Windows host to verify WPF/WinForms runtime behavior.

reproductionSteps.output: No touch/wheel references found in WPF or WinForms views
